items.q: What part of distillation cools the vapour back to liquid?
items.why: Correct answer: Condenser. “Filter paper” sounds right because it borrows the language of the topic — but it fails this question. Re-read the notes on why.

items.q: Which method would best separate water from salty sea water?
items.why: Correct answer: Distillation. “Filtration” sounds right because it borrows the language of the topic — but it fails this question. Re-read the notes on why.

items.q: At what temperature does pure water boil in °C at normal pressure?
items.why: The real figure is 100. The wrong options cluster deliberately close — anchor the exact number to one concrete fact so it can't drift.
